zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft於1643年出生在荷蘭霍蘭洛斯特爾達姆時，她的父親William Cockcroft Sr.38歲，母親Elizabeth Burnet30歲。她於1668年與William Hancock III在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1685年7月7日在美國維吉尼亞州諾福爾可享年42歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可諾福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft于1643年出生在荷兰霍蘭洛斯特爾達姆时，她的父亲William Cockcroft Sr.38岁，母亲Elizabeth Burnet30岁。她于1668年与William Hancock III在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1685年7月7日在美国弗吉尼亚州諾福爾可享年42岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Cockcroft
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from a minor place of this name, for example Cockcroft in Rishworth or Cock Croft in Bingley, both in Yorkshire. They are named with Old English cocc ‘rooster’ + croft ‘paddock, smallholding’. In some cases it may be a topographic name with the same meaning.

variants.name: Cockroft
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Cockcroft  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Burnett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname (from an Old French diminutive of brun ‘brown’), in origin a nickname referring to brown colouring of hair, complexion, or clothing. As a female first name it may have been chosen in some cases with reference to the plant Sanguisorba minor, known as burnet, whose leaves are used for salad ( compare Sorrel and Fennel ).

variants.name: Burnet
meanings: Transferred use of the surname (from an Old French diminutive of brun ‘brown’), in origin a nickname referring to brown colouring of hair, complexion, or clothing. As a female first name it may have been chosen in some cases with reference to the plant Sanguisorba minor, known as burnet, whose leaves are used for salad ( compare Sorrel and Fennel ).

historicEvents.description: End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft was born in 1643, in Rotterdam, Holland, Netherlands, her father, William Cockcroft Sr., was 38 and her mother, Elizabeth Burnet, was 30. She married William Hancock III in 1668, in Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 7 July 1685, in Norfolk, Virginia, United States, at the age of 42, and was buried in Norfolk, Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft est née en 1643, à Rotterdam, Holland, Pays-Bas, son père, William Cockcroft Sr., avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Burnet, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé William Hancock III en 1668, à Norfolk, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 juillet 1685, à Norfolk, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Norfolk, Norfolk, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroftが1643年にオランダホーランドロッテルダムで生まれた時，父William Cockcroft Sr.は38歳，母Elizabeth Burnetは30歳であった。1668年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ノーフォルクでWilliam Hancock IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1685年7月7日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ノーフォルクで42歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ノーフォルクノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft(이)가 1643년 네덜란드 홀랜드 로터다에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Cockcroft Sr.(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Burnet(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1668년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 노르폴크에서 William Hancock III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1685년 7월 7일 미국 버지니아 주 노르폴크에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 노르폴크 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft nasceu em 1643, em Rotterdam, Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, William Cockcroft Sr., tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Burnet, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com William Hancock III em 1668, em Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de julho de 1685, em Norfolk, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Norfolk, Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft родилась в 1643 г. в местности роттирдам, холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени William Cockcroft Sr. было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Burnet, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Hancock III в 1668 г. в местности норфолк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 7 июля 1685 г. в местности норфолк, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности норфолк, норфолк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft nació en 1643, en Rotterdam, Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, William Cockcroft Sr., tenía 38 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Burnet, tenía 30 años. Se casó con William Hancock III en 1668, en Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 7 de julio de 1685, en Norfolk, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Norfolk, Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America.
